title: FFC modded SMP season 2
description:
the sequel to the first season. 
now a bit more beautiful,
with more mobs,
less dragons
body:
The Modpack running on the [FreeFantasyCraft survival multiplayer server](https://minecraft.fantasydragon.xyz/server).

Designed with **social features** such as
- SimpleVoiceChat + Radios
- Avatar Customization via Figura
- Create Numismatics Money

And a focus on **Create** with
- Valkyrien Skies
- Steam n' Rails
- TheFactoryMustGrow, new Age

Aswell as magic using irons spellbooks, create wizardry

Utilizing multiple mods to make minecraft look and feel more alive:
- Alex's mobs
- Dynamic Trees
- Distant Horizons
- SimpleClouds
